query:
SELECT university_name,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_images
FROM professors
GROUP BY university_name
HAVING missing_images > 0
ORDER BY missing_images DESC
LIMIT 20;
